prompt: For a polished browser Space Invaders clone, give a compact implementation checklist for player movement, firing, enemy formation movement, collision rules, lives, scoring, and wave progression. No tool calls. Plain text only.

For a polished browser Space Invaders clone, give a compact checklist for game feel: timing, difficulty curve, enemy speed-up, shooting cadence, hit feedback, screen shake restraint, and restart behavior. No tool calls. Plain text only.

For a polished browser Space Invaders clone rendered on HTML canvas without external assets, propose a compact visual direction and concrete drawing techniques for player, invaders, shields, bullets, stars, HUD, and overlay screens. No tool calls. Plain text only.

For a self-contained browser Space Invaders clone, propose a compact Web Audio sound plan using synthesized oscillators only: shot, hit, explosion, wave clear, player damage, game over. No tool calls. Plain text only.

For a browser Space Invaders clone, give a compact control and accessibility checklist covering keyboard, pointer/touch, pause, mute, focus loss, reduced motion, and clear instructions. No tool calls. Plain text only.

For a maintainable vanilla JavaScript Canvas Space Invaders clone, propose a compact architecture separating pure game state updates from rendering and browser input. Mention testable pure functions. No tool calls. Plain text only.

For a vanilla JavaScript Space Invaders clone, write a compact automated test checklist for pure gameplay logic: bounds, cooldown, collisions, shields, formation reversal, scoring, wave clear, lives, and game over. No tool calls. Plain text only.

Act as a game QA reviewer. Give a compact manual acceptance checklist for a finished browser Space Invaders clone, including start, pause, mute, win progression, loss, restart, responsive canvas, and touch controls. No tool calls. Plain text only.
Synthesize the upstream specialist advice into a concise prioritized acceptance checklist for implementing and verifying a complete self-contained browser Space Invaders clone. Plain text only.
